name: AFFIRM fisetin frailty trial in older women registry
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov registry-only record for NCT03430037, a phase 2 randomized placebo-controlled fisetin trial in healthy postmenopausal women age 70 years or older; the retained v2 API snapshot lists enrolling-by-invitation status and no posted results section.

provenance.note: Registry status, phase, enrollment, population, and no-results interpretation come from the retained ClinicalTrials.gov v2 snapshot.

population: Healthy postmenopausal women age 70 years or older; registry condition is Frail Elderly Syndrome.
